title: Proxmox virtualization
inventory_docs: inventory/manual/systems/ (hypervisors with tag proxmox or automation_targets: ["proxmox"])

services.title: Create LXC container
services.summary: Provision an LXC guest on a cluster node via the Proxmox API (ostemplate from config or flags).

services.title: Clone QEMU VM
services.summary: Full clone from a QEMU template; resolves the template node automatically.

services.title: List QEMU templates
services.summary: List QEMU templates in the cluster (use vmid for create-vm or provision.qemu.template_vmid).

services.title: Verify provision templates
services.summary: Sync Ubuntu LTS templates, apt dist-upgrade hypervisors (sequential reboot), optional bootstrap-hdc.

services.title: Bootstrap hdc user
services.summary: Create/update the hdc Linux user on bootstrap_hosts (SSH); passwords stored in vault.

services.title: Cluster inventory snapshot
services.summary: Query hypervisors and guests from config.json; JSON systems[] on stdout.
